title: Fix mkdirSync static import and verify gates
description: Confirm mkdirSync is statically imported from "fs" at top of src/store/graph.ts, save() has no await, then run npm run build, npm test, and npm run lint to verify all gates pass. Update CLAUDE.md known-issues entry once gates are green.

Confirm mkdirSync is in top-level import from 'fs' - correct
Confirm save() has no await keyword - correct synchronous implementation
Run TypeScript build to verify no TS1308 errors
Run test suite to verify CART-B01 regression guard passes
Run linter to confirm code quality standards are met
Update CLAUDE.md known-issues section if needed
No version bump required - internal verification only
No schema changes - no migration needed
Fully backwards compatible - no API changes
Three gate commands: npm run build, npm test, npm run lint
Acceptance criteria: all gates pass, code inspection confirms fix
